name: Stack Graffiti
short_description: A puzzle action game in which players try to clear stages by moving their own drawn rakugaki through trial and error!
detailed_description:
Game Overview 👀

Move the character you drew and try to reach the goal! 　

The character cannot jump, so it cannot climb up a foothold or a wall.

However, the character can sleep to stay in place and become a foothold for his friends.

When a character goes to sleep, a new character can be drawn, and the player rides on top of the sleeping character to reach the flag.

When the character reaches the flag, the stage is cleared!

The fewer characters it takes to clear a stage, the higher the score.

Aim for a high score!
